name: arbor
description: Initialize Arbor state and run hookless framework checks for AGENTS.md, project memory, and Claude bridge files.

interface.longDescription: Arbor is a lightweight hookless context layer for Codex and Claude Code. It initializes AGENTS.md, .arbor/memory.md, and CLAUDE.md, appends a runtime contract for startup and finalization, and checks those surfaces with one deterministic framework report. It does not provide planning, coding, review, release, project-summary, health, or maintenance workflows.
defaultPrompt: Run a minimal Arbor framework check for hookless managed files
Repair missing Arbor framework files and hookless runtime contract
